CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, original String, translated String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Münchener Straße', translateUTF8('Münchener Straße', 'üß', 'us'));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, 'Füße und Straße', translateUTF8('Füße und Straße', 'üß', 'us'));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (3, 'Über den Wolken', translateUTF8('Über den Wolken', 'ü', 'ue'));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (7, 'Schöner Körper', translateUTF8('Schöner Körper', 'ö', 'oe'));
SELECT * FROM test_strings WHERE translated = 'Muenchener Strasse';
SELECT id, original, translated FROM test_strings WHERE translated LIKE '%us%';
SELECT MIN(id) AS min_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM (SELECT id, translateUTF8(original, 'äöü', 'aoue') AS translated FROM test_strings) AS subquery;
SELECT id, translated FROM (SELECT id, translateUTF8(original, 'äöü', 'aoue') AS translated FROM test_strings) WHERE translated LIKE 'M%';
CREATE TABLE languages (lang_code String, lang_name String);
SELECT ts.id, ts.original, ts.translated, l.lang_name FROM test_strings ts JOIN languages l ON l.lang_code = 'de' WHERE translated != original;
